case_title: HARVEY ANNE VS BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARVEY ANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA $305.56 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $325.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $305.56 FILED BY HARVEY ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO BRIAN J. DONNELLY (BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA) RETURNED SIGNED.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM RANDY E. HENDEL, LEGAL ASSIST. BLUE CROSS OF CA. FILED.
